script:
set +e
echo '=== chain perms: /home -> /home/aixa -> /.claude -> /file ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home /home/aixa /home/aixa/.claude /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== ACLs on aixa creds ==='
getfacl /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== compare heather (working) ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/heather /home/heather/.claude /home/heather/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
getfacl /home/heather/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1 | head -10
echo '=== sudo -u aixa stat its own file ==='
sudo -u aixa stat /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '===END==='
